info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: DUnayati Davati Davate Dunoti DunAti ca DunIte  DUnoti Dunute  syuH padAni kampe viDUnane Duvati ' (Slo. 26) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'agnO prAstaM praDUyeta taTA tUlaM dvijottama taTA gaNgAvagAQasya sarvapApaM praDUyate' (BA॰anu॰26.2) ayamapapAWaH pradUyata ityeva pAWaH CAndogyopanizadi taTA darSanAdarTasANgatyAcca
'saM gA asmaByaM DUnuhi' (f॰1.10.8) gAH saM gamayyetaH prerayetyAha
'samindro rAyo bfhatIraDUnuta saM kzoRI samu sUryam' (f॰vAlaKilyezu 4.10) samaDUnuta=sammArjanyeva samagfhRAt
'yaTA nirDUtasakturBastrEvaM saMlInaH Sizye' (Sa0 brA0 16316) nirDUtA viDUya niHsAritAH saktavo yasyAH sA taToktA
'nirDUtAnvAyunA paSya santatAn puzpasaYcayAn' (rA0 29510) nirDUtAn prakIrRAn vikziptAn
'paruzARi ca saMSrAvya nirDUtosmi balIyasA' (rA0 4832) nirDUtaH=avakziptaH tiraskftaH
'antarIkzAd vinirDUtAstasya vegena rAkzasAH BUmO nipatitAH…' (rA0 61689) vinirDUtAH parAkziptA utsAritAH parARunnAH
